refreshCadence: U.S. equities refresh from backend/CI Alpaca cache when credentials are configured. Korea adapter is pending KIS/KRX review; retained rows are visibly marked by sourceKind/dataQuality.
methodology: Category returns are equal-weighted from visible assets for the selected window. U.S. price paths come from backend/CI Alpaca stock bars when configured; the frontend reads only this static JSON and never receives provider credentials.
failures: 005930.KS: non-U.S. provider adapter pending; existing row retained.
000660.KS: non-U.S. provider adapter pending; existing row retained.

sources.label: Alpaca iex stock bars via backend/CI cache.
sources.plannedRefresh: 15-30 min during U.S. regular sessions; close cache after market close.

sources.label: Korea Investment Open API / KRX quote adapter pending; existing sample/static rows retained until reviewed credentials and redistribution terms are configured.
sources.plannedRefresh: 30 min during KRX regular sessions; close cache after market close.

categories.subtitleZh: 玻璃、特种材料、先进基板
供电、散热、机柜与机房基础设施
企业 AI、端侧 AI、自动驾驶与机器人
categories.subtitleEn: Enterprise AI, edge AI, autonomy and robotics

categories.titleZh: 其他：云平台与算力需求
categories.subtitleZh: 云平台、AI 算力租赁与下游需求观察
categories.subtitleEn: Cloud platforms, AI compute rental, and downstream demand

ASML.name: ASML Holding
ASML.roleZh: EUV/DUV 光刻核心设备供应商，先进制程扩产的上游瓶颈之一。
ASML.roleEn: Core EUV/DUV lithography supplier and a key bottleneck for advanced-node capacity.

AMAT.name: Applied Materials
AMAT.roleZh: 沉积、刻蚀、材料工程设备龙头，覆盖逻辑与存储扩产。
AMAT.roleEn: Deposition, etch, and materials engineering equipment across logic and memory capex.

LRCX.name: Lam Research
LRCX.roleZh: 刻蚀、沉积与清洗设备，和先进制程及 HBM 产能扩张高度相关。
LRCX.roleEn: Etch, deposition, and clean equipment tied to advanced nodes and HBM capacity expansion.

GLW.name: Corning
GLW.roleZh: 玻璃与特种材料供应商，可作为光通信材料和先进基板方向的观察点。
GLW.roleEn: Glass and specialty materials supplier, watched for optical materials and advanced substrate themes.

TSM.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing
TSM.roleZh: 先进制程代工核心，承接 GPU、ASIC、CPU 等高端芯片制造。
TSM.roleEn: Advanced-node foundry leader for GPUs, ASICs, CPUs, and other high-end silicon.

INTC.name: Intel
INTC.roleZh: CPU、IDM 与代工转型观察标的，也连接先进封装叙事。
INTC.roleEn: CPU, IDM, and foundry turnaround watchlist name with advanced-packaging exposure.

005930.KS.name: Samsung Electronics
005930.KS.roleZh: 存储、晶圆制造、消费电子综合龙头，HBM 进展是近期核心变量。
005930.KS.roleEn: Memory, foundry, and consumer electronics leader; HBM progress is the key current variable.
005930.KS.dataQuality: Korea price adapter pending; retaining existing sample/static row.

000660.KS.name: SK hynix
000660.KS.roleZh: HBM 龙头热门股，是存储链条强弱的核心观察点。
000660.KS.roleEn: HBM leader and a core hotspot for memory-chain rotation.
000660.KS.dataQuality: Korea price adapter pending; retaining existing sample/static row.

MU.name: Micron Technology
MU.roleZh: DRAM/HBM 与 NAND 供应商，美股存储链核心弹性标的。
MU.roleEn: DRAM/HBM and NAND supplier with high U.S.-listed memory-cycle sensitivity.

WDC.name: Western Digital
WDC.roleZh: HDD 与存储设备标的，受 AI 数据存储需求和存储周期影响。
WDC.roleEn: HDD and storage devices, influenced by AI data storage demand and memory cycles.

SNDK.name: Sandisk
SNDK.roleZh: NAND/SSD 方向标的，用于观察闪存与存储模组情绪。
SNDK.roleEn: NAND/SSD exposure for flash and storage-module sentiment.

DRAM.name: Roundhill Memory ETF
DRAM.roleZh: 记忆/HBM 主题 ETF，不是单一公司股票，用作存储链主题温度计。
DRAM.roleEn: Memory/HBM thematic ETF, used as a chain-level thermometer rather than a single company.

NVDA.name: NVIDIA
NVDA.roleZh: AI GPU、网络和软件生态核心，是产业链情绪基准之一。
NVDA.roleEn: AI GPU, networking, and software ecosystem leader, often the sentiment benchmark.

AMD.name: Advanced Micro Devices
AMD.roleZh: GPU、CPU 与 AI 加速卡供应商，观察追赶型算力弹性。
AMD.roleEn: GPU, CPU, and AI accelerator supplier, watched for catch-up compute-cycle elasticity.

ARM.name: Arm Holdings
ARM.roleZh: CPU IP 与架构授权，连接端侧 AI、云 CPU 与定制芯片。
ARM.roleEn: CPU IP and architecture licensing across edge AI, cloud CPUs, and custom silicon.

AVGO.name: Broadcom
AVGO.roleZh: ASIC、交换芯片与网络互联核心，也覆盖软件资产。
AVGO.roleEn: ASIC, switching silicon, and networking interconnect leader with software exposure.

COHR.name: Coherent
COHR.roleZh: 光器件、激光器与材料供应商，是光模块链条的重要观察点。
COHR.roleEn: Optical components, lasers, and materials supplier for the optical-module chain.

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology
MRVL.roleZh: DPU、网络芯片、光互联 DSP 与定制芯片平台。
MRVL.roleEn: DPU, networking silicon, optical DSP, and custom silicon platform.

NOK.name: Nokia
NOK.roleZh: 通信与网络设备标的，可辅助观察数据中心和运营商网络支出。
NOK.roleEn: Communications and network equipment exposure for data-center and carrier network spending.

SMCI.name: Super Micro Computer
SMCI.roleZh: AI 服务器整机和集群交付标的，对 GPU 服务器需求高度敏感。
SMCI.roleEn: AI server systems and cluster delivery name with high GPU server demand sensitivity.

DELL.name: Dell Technologies
DELL.roleZh: 企业服务器、存储和 AI 基础设施整机供应商。
DELL.roleEn: Enterprise server, storage, and AI infrastructure systems supplier.

VRT.name: Vertiv
VRT.roleZh: 数据中心供电、热管理和基础设施标的，受 AI 机房资本开支驱动。
VRT.roleEn: Data-center power, thermal management, and infrastructure name driven by AI facility capex.

IBM.name: IBM
IBM.roleZh: 企业 AI、混合云和软件服务观察标的。
IBM.roleEn: Enterprise AI, hybrid cloud, and software services exposure.

AAPL.name: Apple
AAPL.roleZh: 端侧 AI 与消费硬件生态观察标的。
AAPL.roleEn: Edge AI and consumer hardware ecosystem exposure.

TSLA.name: Tesla
TSLA.roleZh: 自动驾驶、人形机器人与端侧 AI 叙事标的。
TSLA.roleEn: Autonomy, humanoid robotics, and edge AI narrative exposure.

POET.name: POET Technologies
POET.roleZh: 硅光子、光引擎与光互联平台标的，适合作为光模块链条的高弹性观察项。
POET.roleEn: Silicon photonics, optical engine, and optical interconnect platform exposure.

LITE.name: Lumentum Holdings
LITE.roleZh: 光通信器件、激光器和数据中心光互联供应商。
LITE.roleEn: Optical communications components, lasers, and data-center optical interconnect supplier.

AAOI.name: Applied Optoelectronics
AAOI.roleZh: 数据中心光模块与光器件标的，对高速互联景气度较敏感。
AAOI.roleEn: Data-center optical module and component exposure with sensitivity to high-speed interconnect cycles.

AMZN.name: Amazon.com
AMZN.roleZh: AWS 云平台和自研 AI 芯片需求侧观察标的，不属于单一芯片物理环节。
AMZN.roleEn: AWS cloud platform and in-house AI silicon demand signal; not a single physical chip-chain component.

NBIS.name: Nebius Group
NBIS.roleZh: AI 云与 GPU 算力租赁标的，归入其他下游需求观察。
NBIS.roleEn: AI cloud and GPU compute rental exposure, grouped as downstream demand.
